prompt:
Nobody can disagree that Earth is our home. It gives us food, beauty of nature, possibilities to create. But as long as we live there, our planet has became more polluted place. Does this pollutions affect environmental problems? Must we pay attention to this problem?

In the modern world more people start to be concerned about environmental problem. But most of them overreact, making pollution problem looks not vital but dumb. And that is a huge problem. It cause politicians do not look at the main point - health of our home - Earth. People who cares about environmental health significantly overreacting and that makes problem look unimportant.

But climate changes is not just fantasies of crazy eco-activists. We can clearly feel it by observing snow in Moscow in the last month of spring. Trash island and tornados should make people think and speak about pollution problem. But in more polite way. Environmental health is important and we must talk about it.

Collecting all thoughts, only people responsible for pollutions and environmental health problems. We need to talk about it and make decisions in the way of making Earth more clear. But we must do it politely, with a look straight to the future.

TASK: Some people believe that too much attention has been paid recently to environmental problems. How much do you agree? Write a 4-paragraph essay.
STUDENT_TEXT: Nobody can disagree that Earth is our home. It gives us food, beauty of nature, possibilities to create. But as long as we live there, our planet has became more polluted place. Does this pollutions affect environmental problems? Must we pay attention to this problem?

In the modern world more people start to be concerned about environmental problem. But most of them overreact, making pollution problem looks not vital but dumb. And that is a huge problem. It cause politicians do not look at the main point - health of our home - Earth. People who cares about environmental health significantly overreacting and that makes problem look unimportant.

But climate changes is not just fantasies of crazy eco-activists. We can clearly feel it by observing snow in Moscow in the last month of spring. Trash island and tornados should make people think and speak about pollution problem. But in more polite way. Environmental health is important and we must talk about it.

Collecting all thoughts, only people responsible for pollutions and environmental health problems. We need to talk about it and make decisions in the way of making Earth more clear. But we must do it politely, with a look straight to the future.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
